name: Golf Simulator @ Meyer Fitness
address: 945 Woodrow Ave Suite B, Norfolk, VA 23517
about: Meyer Fitness offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator equipped with SkyTrak technology for real-time 3D shot analysis and ball-flight data. The simulator provides instant feedback on metrics like Ball Speed, Backspin, Launch Angle, and Carry Distance, making it ideal for players looking to improve their game in a controlled environment. Located within a larger fitness facility, the venue combines golf practice with professional coaching services, offering customized golf fitness plans that include training, mobility drills, and nutrition strategies.
why_golfers_like_it: SkyTrak launch monitor provides instant and accurate shot data
Golf fitness programs tailored to improve strength and power
Can practice year-round regardless of weather conditions
Opportunity to compete in leagues and long drive competitions

simulator_hardware.notes: Personal launch monitor with real-time 3D shot analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There's no mention of food or drink services, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for 18 holes, as the focus is on practice and skill development.

faq.answer: While junior coaching is mentioned, there's no specific information about family-oriented amenities or age restrictions.
